Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Stormrock]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Stormrock is the name of the Skysworn's cloudship city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Stormrock is a city of obsidian buildings that costs wind scales to keep aloft.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Stormrock has a population of almost two million people when needed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Stormrock contains about five thousand Skysworn or trainees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Stormrock is a city with records of cloudship departures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Stormrock will pass over Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Stormrock is a location Cassias recently left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Dreadgod's scream had quieted, but Stormrock was still rushing away.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Fisher Gesha's family set up a Soulsmith's shop in the floating city of Stormrock.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Stormrock is a floating city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Stormrock is the location of the Starsweep Tower.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Gwei dumped Yerin and Eithan out of Stormrock.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Stormrock is a Skysworn city located near Serpent’s Grave.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Stormrock has protective scripts.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
